IntroductionSection.title: Your complete financial portfolio in one place
IntroductionSection.description: Connect to multiple exchanges, track your investments, and analyze your performance with powerful charts and insights.

FeaturesSection.title: Everything you need to track your investments
FeaturesSection.description: {siteName} provides powerful tools to help you understand your portfolio performance across multiple platforms.

performance.title: Performance Tracking
performance.description: Track your investment performance over time with detailed charts and metrics.

allocation.title: Portfolio Allocation
allocation.description: Visualize your asset allocation across different exchanges and investment types.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.description: Gain insights with advanced analytics including profit/loss, ROI, and risk assessment.

security.title: Secure Connections
security.description: Connect securely to your exchanges with read-only API access and bank-level encryption.

realtime.title: Real-time Updates
realtime.description: Get real-time updates on your portfolio value and individual asset performance.

mobile.title: Mobile Access
mobile.description: Access your portfolio data on the go with our mobile app for iOS and Android.

IntegrationSection.title: Connect with your favorite platforms
IntegrationSection.description: {siteName} integrates with major stock exchanges, crypto platforms, and brokerages.

ChartPreviewSection.title: Powerful analytics at your fingertips
ChartPreviewSection.description: Visualize the investment performance of all your aggregated stock exchange accounts with interactive charts and detailed metrics. Identify trends, track growth, and make informed decisions.

ActionSection.title: Ready to take control of your investments?
ActionSection.description: Join thousands of investors who use {siteName} to track and analyze their portfolios.

PricingSection.title: Simple, transparent pricing
PricingSection.description: Choose the plan that's right for you and start tracking your investments today.

NoPricingSection.title: We're Still Figuring It Out
NoPricingSection.description: {siteName} is completely free while we build the perfect product and determine fair pricing that works for everyone.

promise.title: Our Promise
promise.description: When we do introduce pricing, early users will receive advance notice, grandfathered rates, and special benefits. We believe in rewarding the people who help us build {siteName}.

currentStatus.title: 100% Free Right Now
currentStatus.description: All features, no limits, no credit card required

community.title: Building Community
community.description: We want to build a strong user base and understand what features matter most before introducing pricing.

features.title: Perfecting Features
features.description: We're focused on building the best possible product. Pricing will come when we deliver exceptional value.

pricing.title: Fair Pricing
pricing.description: When we do introduce pricing, it will be fair, transparent, and provide clear value for what you pay.

one.title: Build & Learn
one.description: Keep everything free while we develop features and learn from user feedback

two.title: Research & Plan
two.description: Study user needs and market conditions to design fair pricing

three.title: Transparent Launch
three.description: Announce pricing well in advance with grandfathered benefits for early users

feedback.title: Help Us Shape Our Pricing
feedback.description: Your input matters! Let us know what you think about pricing for investment tracking tools.

FeaturesPage.title: Connect Your Investment Accounts
FeaturesPage.description: {siteName} allows you to seamlessly connect and monitor your investment accounts from various stock exchanges and brokers in one place.

items.one: • View all your investments in one dashboard

IntegrationsPage.title: Connect Your Investment Platforms
IntegrationsPage.description: {siteName} seamlessly integrates with major trading platforms, giving you a unified view of all your investments in one secure dashboard.

security.title: Secure Connections
security.description: Read-only API access ensures your accounts remain secure while syncing data.

realtime.title: Real-Time Updates
realtime.description: Get live updates of your portfolio performance across all connected platforms.

analytics.title: Unified Analytics
analytics.description: View comprehensive analytics of your entire investment portfolio in one place.

cta.title: Ready to consolidate your investments?
cta.description: Start tracking all your investments in one place. More integrations are added regularly.

DocsPage.title: Documentation
DocsPage.description: Everything you need to know about using and integrating with {siteName}

one.title: 1. Create an Account
one.description: Sign up using your email or social accounts. Verify your email address to activate your account.

two.title: 2. Connect Your Platforms
two.description: Navigate to the Integrations page and connect your preferred trading platforms using secure API keys.

three.title: 3. Configure Your Dashboard
three.description: Customize your dashboard layout and widgets to match your investment tracking needs.

apiKey.title: API Key Security
apiKey.description: Always use read-only API keys. Never share your API keys or store them in unsecured locations.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.descriptionOne: Enable 2FA on your account for an additional layer of security.
twoFactor.descriptionTwo: This adds an extra layer of protection to your account.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: All API requests require a valid API key in the Authorization header.

trading212.one: 1. Log in to your Trading212 account
trading212.three: 3. Generate a new read-only API key

binance.one: 1. Log in to your Binance account
binance.three: 3. Create a new API key with read-only permissions
binance.four: 4. Enter the API key and secret in {siteName}

connectionIssues.title: Connection Issues
connectionIssues.one: 1. Verify your API keys are valid
connectionIssues.two: 2. Check if the platform is operational
connectionIssues.three: 3. Ensure you have the correct permissions

syncDelays.title: Data Sync Delays
syncDelays.lead: Data updates may be delayed due to:

LoginPage.title: Sign in
LoginPage.description: Enter your email below to sign in to your account
LoginPage.registerLink: Don't have an account? Register here

RegisterPage.title: Create an account
RegisterPage.description: Enter your details below to create your account
RegisterPage.loginLink: Already have an account? Sign In

errors.failedToSignInAfterRegistration: Failed to sign in after registration
